title: Senior Software Engineer (AI Tooling)
company_focus:
Alternative investment firm deploying relative value
strategies across fixed income markets
description:
Garda Capital Partners (Garda) is a multi-billion dollar
alternative investment firm with over 22 years of experience
deploying relative value strategies across fixed income
markets for institutional investors. Garda's primary offices
are located in Wayzata, New York City, West Palm Beach,
Geneva, Zug, Copenhagen, Singapore, and Scottsdale.

Garda is looking to hire a Senior Software Engineer (AI
Tooling) to be a part of our Research and Technology (R&T)
group to design and build systems that integrate modern AI
capabilities across the firm. The selected candidate will
lead technical projects, architect backend infrastructure,
and create applications that enable research, trading, and
operations teams to leverage AI tools effectively.

This is a senior engineering role focused on building
production systems and internal platforms—not ML research or
model development. You'll design API gateways, build vector
search infrastructure, create AI-powered internal
applications, and work with business stakeholders to
translate requirements into robust technical solutions. The
ideal candidate is excited about the practical applications
of AI but wants to focus on software engineering, system
design, and delivery. Experience in financial services or
capital markets is strongly preferred.

Position Responsibilities

- Design and lead implementation of backend infrastructure for
  AI capabilities (LLM gateways, vector databases, chat
  services, monitoring systems)
- Build internal applications that integrate AI into research,
  trading, and operations workflows
- Architect data processing pipelines and API integrations for
  AI-powered features
- Own complete projects from design through production
  deployment
- Evaluate new AI platforms and tools; build proofs-of-concept
  and convert successful ones to production
- Provide technical consultation to business stakeholders and
  translate their needs into practical solutions
- Make architectural decisions for systems integrating AI
  capabilities with existing infrastructure
- Build automation workflows that reduce manual processes
  using AI tools
- Develop integrations between internal systems, vendor
  platforms, and AI services
- Establish patterns and best practices for AI application
  development across the firm
- Mentor other engineers and contribute to technical standards
- Collaborate with infrastructure and security teams on
  deployment, scaling, and governance

Qualifications & Desired Skills

- Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Engineering,
  Mathematics, Finance, or related field
- 5+ years of software engineering experience
- Strong programming skills in Python (primary language) with
  experience in other languages a plus
- Proven experience designing and building backend services,
  APIs, and internal platforms
- Experience with cloud platforms, containerization, or
  distributed systems
- Strong interest in AI applications and modern development
  tools; no ML/deep learning background required
- Ability to evaluate new technologies, build prototypes, and
  make pragmatic technical decisions
- Experience with fixed income, trading systems, or investment
  management operations strongly preferred
- Capital markets knowledge is a significant advantage
- Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to learn new
  technologies rapidly
- Strong communication skills with ability to work effectively
  across technical and business teams
- Self-directed with ability to drive projects independently
  from concept to production
- Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with
  evolving requirements
- Excited about building practical tools that deliver real
  business value

This role is also eligible for other forms of compensation
and benefits, such as a discretionary bonus, healthcare
plan, 401(k) matching program, etc. Within the range,
individual pay is determined by work location and additional
factors, such as job-related skills, experience, and
relevant education.

Base Salary for this role is expected to be between:

$200,000—$250,000 USD

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role builds infrastructure and platforms that enable
others to use AI tools (LLM gateways, vector databases,
internal applications), but explicitly states it's NOT about
ML research or model development. The focus is on software
engineering and system design to support AI adoption, not
hands-on model work.
